title: ManePear's Scythe
description: This project adds the original scythe from ManePear's videos.
body:
This project adds the original scythe from ManePear's videos to your game. This includes the custom attack damage, the custom attack speed, a custom recipe and a new made texture.

**IMPORTANT: 
Make sure to download the resourcepack AND the datapack or else it is not going to work!! This project DOES NOT CHANGE THE MACE. It adds a completely new item to the game including a texture. I have made the texture myself and did not copy any images for this project. And remember, you cant put datapacks in your mods folder or else it won't work!**

This is how the scythe is going to work:
attack damage: 13, attack speed: -1.5, recipe: in the gallery

This new weapon is basically the exact same as in ManePear's videos. You can enchant the scythe the same as the mace. **Although i would not recommend combining breach 4 with strengh 2; you can two hit a fully stacked netherite player :)**

I have made a modified version of my current project aswell, so go check it out too!
(https://modrinth.com/datapack/manepear-modified-scythe-resourcepack)
